meta.question: List APS Interfce Requirements and their Acceptence State.
meta.finalAnswer:
APS Interface Requirements and Acceptance State:

| APS Interface Requirement | Acceptance State |
|---------------------------|------------------|
| APS to CSW ICD | Accepted |
| APS to DMS ICD | Accepted |
| APS to OSS ICD | Accepted |
| APS to SER ICD | Accepted |
| M1CS GLC to APS ICD | Accepted |
| SCMS to APS ICD | Accepted |
| STR to APS ICD | Accepted |
| TCS to APS ICD | Accepted |

All 8 APS Interface Requirements (ICDs) have an Acceptance State of "Accepted".

events.output:
I'll help you find APS Interface Requirements and their Acceptance State. This requires exploration since we need to discover how requirements and their acceptance states are represented in the model.

Let me start with Exploration Step 1:

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found multiple APS-related elements. Need to find actual requirements (tmt%20requirement type) with "Interface" in the name and their acceptance state. Let me search for requirements specifically.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Interface")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found 18 APS requirements, including several Interface Requirements (ICDs). Now need to find the acceptance state property. Let me map properties for one of these requirements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS%20to%20SER%2520ICD"))) 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

  ?elem ?prop ?value .

request.reason: Found the pattern: Acceptance State is stored in stereotype instance slots with defining feature "Acceptance State" and value points to enumeration literal. Now need to build final query for all APS Interface Requirements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?reqName, "APS"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?reqName, "ICD"))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?req vocab:Element_appliedStereotypeInstance ?stereo .
    ?stereo vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
    ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?defFeature .
    FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?defFeature), "Acceptance%20State"))
    ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?value .
    ?value vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?instance .
    ?instance vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState .
  }
}
ORDER BY ?reqName

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

  FILTER(CONTAINS(?reqName, "ICD"))
  ?req vocab:Element_appliedStereotypeInstance ?stereo .
  ?stereo vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?defFeature .

  FILTER(CONTAINS(?name, "APS"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?name, "SER"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?name, "ICD"))
  ?req <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/Element_appliedStereotypeInstance> ?stereo .
  ?stereo <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/InstanceSpecification_slot> ?slot .
  ?slot <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/Slot_value> ?value .
  ?value <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/InstanceValue_instance> ?instance .

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?reqName, "APS"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?reqName, "ICD"))
  ?req vocab:Element_appliedStereotypeInstance ?stereo .
  ?stereo vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?value .
  ?value ?p ?instVal .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?instVal), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/enumeration%20literal"))
  BIND(STR(?instVal) AS ?instValStr)
  BIND(REPLACE(?instValStr, "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/enumeration%20literal/.*::", "") AS ?acceptanceState)
}
ORDER BY ?reqName
